intent_precise: PCR/qPCR prep: distribute samples to 384 well plates:
intent: For this PCR/qPCR prep, you'll need to distribute the samples across 384-well plates. Make sure to carefully pipette each sample into the designated wells, maintaining proper organization for your downstream PCR or qPCR analysis. Keep the plates on ice during the distribution process to preserve sample integrity, and double-check your plate layout before proceeding with the thermal cycling.

output_schema.protocol_name: PCR/qPCR prep: distribute samples to 384 well plates
output_schema.author: Steve Plonk <protocols@opentrons.com>
